---
title: "Bayesian Statistical Theory and Computation"
subtitle: "CORE-011 | Core Mathematics — Year 2"
description: "Bayesian inference is the universal framework for learning from data under uncertainty. This course covers the full theory from prior specification through posterior computation and model comparison."
date: "2026-04-11"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
number-sections: true
---

# Bayesian Statistical Theory and Computation

*Content not yet generated.*

Run the generation pipeline and then `src/quarto_export.jl` to populate this page.
